titles.title: Take me into the Holy of Holies

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Take me past the outer courts Into the Holy Place Past the brazen altar Lord I want to see your face Pass me by the crowds of people And the Priests who sing your praise I hunger and thirst for your righteousness But it's only found in one place

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Take me into the holy of holies Take me in by the blood of the lamb Take me into the holy of holies Take the coal, cleanse my lips, here I am

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Take me past the outer courts Into the Holy Place Past the brazen Alter Lord, I want to see Your face Pass me by the crowds of people The priests who sing Your praise I hunger and thirst for Your righteousness And it's only found in one place
